name: tabular-pdf-generator
description: Generic jsPDF helper for tabular documents (payslip, invoice, manifest, expense report). Header rows + column-based body table + summary box + footer disclaimer. Includes a Swedish payslip example.
postInstall: 2. Import generateTabularPdf and pass an options object (see lib/example-payslip.ts for a worked example)
3. doc.save('filename.pdf') to download, or doc.output('blob') for upload
4. Adjust column offsets (mm from left margin) to fit your column widths — defaults are tuned for A4 portrait
